description: Tattoo artist ed hardy has taken the world by storm with his funky, urban brand - from rock stars to Hollywood legends, those who have a quirky taste in fashion love the tattoo inspired designs. Wear this watch to prove you're a style maverick not a trend follower. Case diameter: 51 mm Case thickness: 7 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Warranty: 2 years Stainless steel rectangle case Broad black genuine leather strap and a tang clasp with a one-prong buckle Pink thread detail and ed hardy print on the straps Black dial with metallic hands and print on the dial Date aperture on the 3 hour mark Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistant up to 50 meters
